item.title: Inline timeout literals in design/configure/ollama.ts and evolve/approval/telegram.ts not in defaults.ts
item.intent: All AbortSignal timeout and polling interval values in design/ and evolve/ modules have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No bare timeout literals remain in those files.
item.description: Two files contain inline timeout values not yet centralized in config/defaults.ts, continuing the BUG-038 through BUG-041 timeout sweep. (1) src/design/configure/ollama.ts: lines 38 and 58 use AbortSignal.timeout(5_000) — an Ollama tag-listing probe timeout. OLLAMA_GENERATE_TIMEOUT_MS (120_000) was added by BUG-041 but this shorter 5_000ms probe timeout was missed. (2) src/evolve/approval/telegram.ts: line 124 uses timeout: 30 (Telegram long-polling timeout in seconds). This controls how long the bot waits for updates — a tunable value with no constant. Steps: (1) add OLLAMA_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS = 5_000 to src/config/defaults.ts with a comment 'Ollama availability check and model listing timeout'; (2) add TELEGRAM_POLLING_TIMEOUT_SEC = 30 to src/config/defaults.ts with a comment 'Telegram long-poll getUpdates timeout in seconds'; (3) import and replace in ollama.ts (lines 38, 58) and telegram.ts (line 124); (4) run design/ and evolve/ tests. Scope: 3 files, ~6 lines changed. Pattern: BUG-038/039/040/041.
